All right guys, JB in the house here. I don't think it's, thank God it's Friday. I love working because I don't think if this is work, I love what I do, but it is Friday, all right? You're closing out on week seven on certification. Those of you who are still not on it, oh my God, come on. Give it a whirl. Call, at least call to find out more, okay? Check it out. I think it's slsc.club or something, whatever. Just check it out. Anyway, here's the deal. We're at that point now where you've really kind of got your vision locked down tight, right? But what I want you to do is go back to it. It's like the last lesson. It's a bonus lesson, 10, right? Make you go back to your vision one more time. Why do I do that? Why do I keep going back and saying, please pick it up one less time, dig deeper? The reason is as follows, is that for some reason, the way our brain works, and I remember this from when I was writing my first book, it's like you peel back the layers of your own unconscious. Like when you think about something and you start writing it down, all of a sudden it touches deeper layers within you and, whoa, something else has woken up. That's why you want to keep peeling back these layers. So give yourself the benefit here of going back to it one more time and making sure that everything in that vision statement, your why, your actual outcomes, where you're going, make sure it truly is at the highest level of what turns you on. And then we say that unless the hairs in the back of your neck are standing up, you're not doing it right. Use the power of language. Make it bright. Use big words and think big. You were born just, you know, you were born to be great. You were not born to be average. And whether you believe in God or nature, it's our nature to be awesome. There is no reason. I don't care where you go up. I don't care where you are right now in the totem pole of life, love, success. You put one foot in front of the other and you say the words I've taught you. You follow this vision. You get strong. Educate yourself. Learn how to share your vision. That's a big part of your vision is sharing that vision in a way that moves people, inspires them to take action to make your vision become a reality. Like I always say, people will never follow you because you have a goal. People follow vision and every human being is thirsty for a vision and so few human beings have taken the time to develop one. So what do they do? They gravitate towards someone who has a vision and they buy into that vision and make it a reality. Chiefs Indians. Chiefs have vision Indians don't. They follow. Being wrong with making someone else's vision a reality. It really isn't. But within that, by the way, you could, that the two are not mutually exclusive. You can have your own incredible vision and part of your vision is making someone else's vision a reality. But have a vision. Have something that sits atop everything you're doing day to day, the goals. Have someone sits on top of that and serves as your guiding light. That's your emotional attachment. And make sure, remember, this is always your why is not going to be about money. It's about unconditional love that you have for other people and for causes you believe in. That's what your why is going to be. Why are you doing what you do? Why do you want to work this on? Why do you want to go through obstacles and barriers? Why do you want to strive for success? Why? And I should say that why is usually a who or a what. Who is going to benefit? Not you. Who that you love, your children, your family, your spouse, what causes that you believe in? Are you going to essentially support? How does that impact? How does your vision achieving it impact those things in a positive way? That's the secret to being motivated to achievement. Seriously, the secret to achievement is knowing why it matters to you. That's where it all starts. People say, oh, I'm not motivated. I'm like, you know what? You don't know your why and you don't have a vision because if you did, you would be motivated. Think about it. Think back in your own life. Just get honest with yourself. All the times that you just didn't really feel like getting out of bed, didn't really want to kind of perform at school or whatever. You didn't really just put your all into it. Why? Because you didn't have a vision. There was no outcome. There was nothing that emotionally drove you. Once you harness this power of vision focus to create that vision and to learn to focus that the right way by for Katie focus, you become unstoppable. And of course, you have to have the other side of specialized skills to turn it into reality. The ultimate one, two punch Yin Yang. Once those are both in place, you are set. You can't help but be successful. So let's make this an awesome day. You'll hear from me tomorrow, Saturday, Sunday. We got to give them a quick hello to you, talk about life a bit and have a little fun. For those of you who are working, you got to work on Saturday. You keep working. If you work Sunday, work Sunday. But also there has to be time to enjoy the family, the things that you love to recharge your batteries. But for me, boy, I'll tell you, recharging my batteries is helping you. That's what turns me on. Love you all. I'll speak tomorrow.
